blocks.html: A list holds many items in order, inside square brackets [ ]. Each item has a position, starting at 0.
A dictionary stores information as pairs: a "key" and its "value", inside curly brackets { }.

blocks.starter:
student = {
    "name": "Maya",
    "age": 10,
    "favorite_subject": "Science"
}
print(student["name"], "is", student["age"], "years old")
print("They love", student["favorite_subject"])
blocks.label: Run Code

blocks.html: Make a list called toys with 3 of your favorite toys. Then loop over it with a for loop and print "I love my [toy]!" for each one.

blocks.starter: # build your toy list and loop here
